tasks.subject: Task 0: R6 브랜치 + spec §10 R6 체크리스트 확장 + Decision Log
tasks.description:
**Goal:** `rolestra-phase-r6` 브랜치 main tip(2f9a998)에서 분기. spec §10 Phase R6 블록을 R3/R4/R5와 동일한 체크박스+산출물 링크 템플릿으로 확장. Decision Log 6건(D1~D6) 기록. tasks.json 14-slot skeleton.

**Files:** docs/superpowers/plans/2026-04-22-rolestra-phase-r6.md, docs/superpowers/plans/2026-04-22-rolestra-phase-r6.md.tasks.json, docs/superpowers/specs/2026-04-18-rolestra-design.md (§10 Phase R6만)

**Verify:** `git rev-parse --abbrev-ref HEAD` == rolestra-phase-r6

```json:metadata
{"files":["docs/superpowers/plans/2026-04-22-rolestra-phase-r6.md","docs/superpowers/plans/2026-04-22-rolestra-phase-r6.md.tasks.json","docs/superpowers/specs/2026-04-18-rolestra-design.md"],"verifyCommand":"git rev-parse --abbrev-ref HEAD","acceptanceCriteria":["rolestra-phase-r6 브랜치 생성","Decision Log에 D1~D6 6건 기록","§10 Phase R6 체크박스+산출물 템플릿 확장","tasks.json 14-slot skeleton 존재"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 1: Shared meeting-stream-types + stream-bridge v3 이벤트 API
tasks.description:
**Goal:** `src/shared/meeting-stream-types.ts` discriminated union 5종 (`meeting:state-changed`/`meeting:turn-start`/`meeting:turn-token`/`meeting:turn-done`/`meeting:error`) + zod schema. `src/main/streams/stream-bridge.ts` 에 `emitMeeting*` 5 메서드 + preload 화이트리스트 등록.

**Files:** src/shared/meeting-stream-types.ts, src/main/streams/stream-bridge.ts, src/preload/index.ts, src/main/streams/__tests__/stream-bridge.test.ts

**Verify:** `npm run test -- stream-bridge`

```json:metadata
{"files":["src/shared/meeting-stream-types.ts","src/main/streams/stream-bridge.ts","src/preload/index.ts"],"verifyCommand":"npm run test -- stream-bridge","acceptanceCriteria":["meeting:* 5 이벤트 타입 + zod","stream-bridge.emitMeeting* 5 메서드","preload 화이트리스트 등록","round-trip 테스트 green"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: MeetingSession v3 재작성 (conversation.ts 대체)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** `src/main/meetings/engine/meeting-session.ts` 신규. 기존 SSM/TurnManager/history.ts 자산 재사용. participants ≥ 2 enforcement (D7). meetingId/channelId/projectId 1급 시민.

**Files:** src/main/meetings/engine/meeting-session.ts + __tests__

**Verify:** `npm run test -- meeting-session`

```json:metadata
{"files":["src/main/meetings/engine/meeting-session.ts"],"verifyCommand":"npm run test -- meeting-session","acceptanceCriteria":["ssmCtx 빈 문자열 reject","participants>=2 assertion","기존 history.ts adapter 재사용","8~12 테스트 green"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: MeetingTurnExecutor v3 재작성 + singleton DI 제거
tasks.description:
**Goal:** `src/main/meetings/engine/meeting-turn-executor.ts` 신규. permissionService/workspaceService/consensusFolderService singleton 5곳 참조를 생성자 DI로 전환. streamBridge.emitMeetingTurn* 사용. CLI permission은 v2 registerPendingCliPermission 흐름 유지 (R7 이전).

**Files:** src/main/meetings/engine/meeting-turn-executor.ts + __tests__

**Verify:** `npm run test -- meeting-turn-executor`

```json:metadata
{"files":["src/main/meetings/engine/meeting-turn-executor.ts"],"verifyCommand":"npm run test -- meeting-turn-executor","acceptanceCriteria":["workspace-handler singleton import 0","streamBridge.emitMeetingTurn* 이벤트 발사","messageService.append persistence","12~18 테스트 green"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: MeetingOrchestrator v3 재작성 + v2 stream:* 이벤트 폐기
tasks.description:
**Goal:** `src/main/meetings/engine/meeting-orchestrator.ts` 신규 + main/index.ts DI 배선 + meeting-handler 에서 start → run 체인. v2 `stream:*` 이벤트 발사 지점 제거(legacy 파일은 @deprecated). v3-side-effects wireV3SideEffects() per-meeting 호출.

**Files:** src/main/meetings/engine/meeting-orchestrator.ts + __tests__, src/main/index.ts, src/main/ipc/handlers/meeting-handler.ts

**Verify:** `npm run test -- meeting-orchestrator`

```json:metadata
{"files":["src/main/meetings/engine/meeting-orchestrator.ts","src/main/index.ts","src/main/ipc/handlers/meeting-handler.ts"],"verifyCommand":"npm run test -- meeting-orchestrator","acceptanceCriteria":["run → SSM 전이 → DONE → minutesComposer 호출","v2 stream:* 이벤트 emit 0","v3-side-effects disposer 관리","10~14 테스트 green"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: MeetingMinutesComposer — #회의록 포맷 조립기
tasks.description:
**Goal:** `src/main/meetings/engine/meeting-minutes-composer.ts` 신규. 메타 헤더(회의번호/참여자/주제/SSM/경과/투표) + 합의본 원문 + 종료시각 푸터. FAILED 분기(사유 + 합의본 없음). i18n 라벨 `meeting.minutes.header.*`.

**Files:** src/main/meetings/engine/meeting-minutes-composer.ts + __tests__

**Verify:** `npm run test -- meeting-minutes-composer`

```json:metadata
{"files":["src/main/meetings/engine/meeting-minutes-composer.ts"],"verifyCommand":"npm run test -- meeting-minutes-composer","acceptanceCriteria":["happy path 포맷 정확","FAILED 분기","i18n ko/en","8~10 테스트 green"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: v2 singleton 완전 제거 + @deprecated 마킹
tasks.description:
**Goal:** workspace-handler의 permissionService/workspaceService/consensusFolderService singleton export에 @deprecated 주석. MeetingOrchestrator / MeetingTurnExecutor 전수 grep 으로 workspace-handler import 0 확인. 스모크 테스트로 v3 DI 경로 검증.

**Files:** src/main/ipc/handlers/workspace-handler.ts, src/main/meetings/engine/__tests__/smoke-v3-di.test.ts

**Verify:** `npm run test -- smoke-v3-di`

```json:metadata
{"files":["src/main/ipc/handlers/workspace-handler.ts"],"verifyCommand":"npm run test -- smoke-v3-di","acceptanceCriteria":["meetings/engine workspace-handler import 0","@deprecated 주석 추가","스모크 테스트 green","기존 테스트 regression 0"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 7: execution-coordinator/memory-coordinator 흡수 또는 슬림 재작성
tasks.description:
**Goal:** v2 execution-coordinator(127) + memory-coordinator(142) 책임을 MeetingOrchestrator 메서드 또는 meeting-memory-coordinator.ts 로 이관. ConversationSession 결합 제거. 기존 파일은 @deprecated.

**Files:** src/main/meetings/engine/meeting-memory-coordinator.ts (신규), src/main/meetings/engine/meeting-orchestrator.ts (확장)

**Verify:** `npm run test -- meeting-orchestrator`

```json:metadata
{"files":["src/main/meetings/engine/meeting-memory-coordinator.ts","src/main/meetings/engine/meeting-orchestrator.ts"],"verifyCommand":"npm run test -- meeting-orchestrator","acceptanceCriteria":["execution-coordinator / memory-coordinator 호출자 0","MeetingOrchestrator handleExecutingPhase / runMemoryMaintenance 테스트","기존 coord 2파일 @deprecated"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 8: Renderer use-meeting-stream 훅
tasks.description:
**Goal:** `src/renderer/hooks/use-meeting-stream.ts` 신규. meeting:* 5 이벤트 reducer, live turn buffer 관리, DB message 도착 시 replace. channelId null idle.

**Files:** src/renderer/hooks/use-meeting-stream.ts + __tests__

**Verify:** `npm run test -- use-meeting-stream`

```json:metadata
{"files":["src/renderer/hooks/use-meeting-stream.ts"],"verifyCommand":"npm run test -- use-meeting-stream","acceptanceCriteria":["5 이벤트 reducer","channelId null idle","unmount 구독 해제","10~14 테스트 green"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 9: Thread 본문 재작성 + MeetingBanner 실데이터
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Thread.tsx placeholder 제거. DateSeparator grouping + Message/SystemMessage/ApprovalBlock 분기 + compact mode(연속 author) + live turn 표시 및 DB replace. MeetingBanner elapsed/ssmState/crewCount 실데이터.

**Files:** src/renderer/features/messenger/Thread.tsx, src/renderer/features/messenger/MeetingBanner.tsx + __tests__ 보강

**Verify:** `npm run test -- "Thread|MeetingBanner"`

```json:metadata
{"files":["src/renderer/features/messenger/Thread.tsx","src/renderer/features/messenger/MeetingBanner.tsx"],"verifyCommand":"npm run test","acceptanceCriteria":["placeholder 제거","4 variant 렌더 + compact mode","live → DB replace","MeetingBanner 실데이터","hex literal 0"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 10: Legacy typecheck 170건 정리 (tsconfig.node.json exclude)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** archived `src/main/{memory,recovery,remote}/__tests__` 경로를 tsconfig.node.json exclude 추가. 필요 시 dead test 삭제. npm run typecheck 전체 exit 0.

**Files:** tsconfig.node.json (+ 필요시 dead test 제거)

**Verify:** `npm run typecheck`

```json:metadata
{"files":["tsconfig.node.json"],"verifyCommand":"npm run typecheck","acceptanceCriteria":["typecheck exit 0","typecheck:web 여전히 exit 0","regression 0"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 11: i18n meeting.* namespace populate + keepRemoved
tasks.description:
**Goal:** meeting.minutes.* / meeting.state.* (12 SSM 상태) / meeting.error.* / meeting.notification.* / meeting.banner.state.* 30~40 키 ko/en. keepRemoved 2 regex.

**Files:** src/renderer/i18n/locales/{ko,en}.json, i18next-parser.config.js

**Verify:** `npm run i18n:check`

```json:metadata
{"files":["src/renderer/i18n/locales/ko.json","src/renderer/i18n/locales/en.json","i18next-parser.config.js"],"verifyCommand":"npm run i18n:check","acceptanceCriteria":["30~40 신규 키 ko/en sync","12 SSM 상태 번역","keepRemoved 2 regex","i18n:check clean"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 12: Playwright E2E meeting-flow.spec.ts
tasks.description:
**Goal:** 프로젝트 → 채널 → 회의 시작 → mock provider 턴 → SSM=DONE → #회의록 포스팅 확인 시나리오. e2e mock provider 헬퍼. WSL 제약은 R4/R5 관행대로 DONE_WITH_CONCERNS.

**Files:** e2e/meeting-flow.spec.ts, e2e/helpers/mock-provider.ts

**Verify:** `npx playwright test meeting-flow` (WSL 제약 허용)

```json:metadata
{"files":["e2e/meeting-flow.spec.ts","e2e/helpers/mock-provider.ts"],"verifyCommand":"npx playwright test meeting-flow","acceptanceCriteria":["스펙 파일 land","mock provider 헬퍼","WSL 제약은 done-checklist 기록"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 13: R6 closeout — done-checklist + spec §10 ✓ + tasks 14/14
tasks.description:
**Goal:** r6-done-checklist.md 작성, §10 R6 체크박스 ✓, tasks.json 전체 completed. 최종 게이트(typecheck/lint/test/i18n/theme/build/e2e) 통과 기록.

**Files:** docs/superpowers/specs/r6-done-checklist.md, docs/superpowers/specs/2026-04-18-rolestra-design.md (§10 R6), docs/superpowers/plans/2026-04-22-rolestra-phase-r6.md.tasks.json

**Verify:** 전체 정식 게이트

```json:metadata
{"files":["docs/superpowers/specs/r6-done-checklist.md","docs/superpowers/specs/2026-04-18-rolestra-design.md","docs/superpowers/plans/2026-04-22-rolestra-phase-r6.md.tasks.json"],"verifyCommand":"npm run typecheck && npm run lint && npm run test && npm run i18n:check && npm run theme:check && npm run build","acceptanceCriteria":["done-checklist 완비","§10 모든 체크박스 ✓","tasks 14/14","정식 게이트 전부 통과"]}
```
